def positive_django_save_full_model_in_loop():
    rule_id = "django_save_full_model_in_loop"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Django code saves full model instances in loops without update_fields or bulk updates."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
